description_long: This is a young adult pedestrian with a modern, urban style. The individual has short, tousled hair and wears round sunglasses, a sleeveless crop top with a single strap over one shoulder, and loose, cropped pants adorned with decorative patterns and a side chain. Multiple gold bangles are worn on both arms, and the person has a confident, relaxed stance. The footwear consists of open-toed sandals with thick soles, and a small pouch or accessory hangs from the waistband. The overall appearance suggests a fashionable, streetwise character suitable for contemporary city environments.
description: A stylish young adult with short hair, sunglasses, a sleeveless crop top, loose cropped pants, gold bangles, and open-toed sandals, exuding a modern urban vibe.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crop top, sunglasses, gold bangles, and decorative pants details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, arm bangles, and the pouch hanging from the waistband.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the crop top, pants, and the pouch attachment.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the single-strap top, arm bangles, and sandal profile.
attribute_clothing_type: urban crop top with single shoulder strap, loose cropped pants with decorative elements, and multiple gold bangles
